allow: Bash(grep -r "YO.Tec\\|ITコンサル\\|Home.*About.*Services" /Users/YOT/portfolio-app --include="*.tsx" --include="*.ts" -l 2>/dev/null | grep -v node_modules | grep -v .next)

Bash(cat > /tmp/portfolio_final_test.py << 'EOF'
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright

results = []
errors = []

with sync_playwright\(\) as p:
    browser = p.chromium.launch\(headless=True\)

    # --- トップページ ---
    page = browser.new_page\(\)
    page.on\("console", lambda m: errors.append\(f"[TOP] {m.text}"\) if m.type == "error" else None\)
    page.goto\('http://localhost:3002'\)
    page.wait_for_load_state\('networkidle'\)
    page.screenshot\(path='/tmp/ss_top.png', full_page=True\)

    links = [\(l.inner_text\(\).strip\(\), l.get_attribute\('href'\)\) for l in page.locator\('a'\).all\(\)]
    privacy_link = next\(\(href for text, href in links if 'PRIVACY' in text.upper\(\)\), None\)
    results.append\(f"{'[OK]' if privacy_link == '/privacy' else '[NG]'} PRIVACY POLICY リンク: {privacy_link}"\)

    # --- プライバシーページ ---
    page2 = browser.new_page\(\)
    page2.on\("console", lambda m: errors.append\(f"[PRIVACY] {m.text}"\) if m.type == "error" else None\)
    page2.goto\('http://localhost:3002/privacy'\)
    page2.wait_for_load_state\('networkidle'\)
    page2.screenshot\(path='/tmp/ss_privacy.png', full_page=True\)
    status = page2.evaluate\("\(\) => document.title"\)
    results.append\(f"[OK] プライバシーページ タイトル: {status}"\)

    back_link = page2.locator\('a:has-text\("BACK"\)'\).first
    results.append\(f"{'[OK]' if back_link.count\(\) > 0 else '[NG]'} BACKリンク存在"\)

    # --- /news ページ ---
    page3 = browser.new_page\(\)
    page3.on\("console", lambda m: errors.append\(f"[NEWS] {m.text}"\) if m.type == "error" else None\)
    page3.goto\('http://localhost:3002/news'\)
    page3.wait_for_load_state\('networkidle'\)
    page3.screenshot\(path='/tmp/ss_news.png'\)
    results.append\(f"[OK] Newsページ タイトル: {page3.title\(\)}"\)

    results.append\(f"[{'OK' if not errors else 'WARN'}] コンソールエラー: {'なし' if not errors else str\(errors\)}"\)

    browser.close\(\)

for r in results:
    print\(r\)
EOF

python3 /Users/mac/.claude/plugins/cache/anthropic-agent-skills/example-skills/1ed29a03dc85/skills/webapp-testing/scripts/with_server.py \\
  --server "npm run dev -- -p 3002" \\
  --port 3002 \\
  --timeout 60 \\
  -- python3 /tmp/portfolio_final_test.py 2>&1)
